instruction: Extract the insurance policy details into a JSON object with keys: "policy_number", "holder_name", "policy_type", "coverage_amount_usd", "premium_monthly_usd", "start_date", "expiry_date".
input: Policy #POL-2024-88741 is a homeowners insurance plan held by Thomas Brennan. The policy covers up to $450,000 in damages with a monthly premium of $182. Coverage runs from January 1, 2024 to December 31, 2024.

instruction: Extract the exoplanet discovery data into a JSON object with keys: "planet_name", "host_star", "discovery_year", "distance_light_years", "orbital_period_days", "mass_earth_units", "potentially_habitable".
input: Kepler-452c was discovered in 2024, orbiting the star Kepler-452 approximately 1,400 light-years from Earth. The planet has a mass of 3.8 Earth masses and completes one orbit every 385 days. Scientists have flagged it as potentially habitable.

instruction: Extract clothing product details into a JSON object with keys: "item_name", "brand", "category", "size_range", "fabric", "price_usd", "sustainable_certified".
input: The Terra Linen Blazer by EcoThread is a women's outerwear piece made from 100% organic linen. It is available in sizes XS to XL, priced at $215, and holds the GOTS sustainability certification.

instruction: Extract the power plant data into a JSON object with keys: "plant_name", "operator", "country", "energy_source", "capacity_mw", "commissioned_year", "operational".
input: The Solara Sunrise facility, operated by GreenGrid Energy in Morocco, is a utility-scale solar power plant with a generation capacity of 580 MW. It was commissioned in 2022 and remains fully operational.

instruction: Extract campaign details into a JSON object with keys "campaign" (sub-keys: "campaign_id", "disease", "target_population", "launch_date") and "agency" (sub-keys: "name", "country", "funding_source").

instruction: Extract the earnings report summary into a JSON object with flat keys "company", "fiscal_quarter", "reported_date", "total_revenue_usd_billions" and an array key "segments" where each element has "segment_name", "revenue_usd_billions", "yoy_growth_percent".

instruction: Extract the performance review details into a JSON object with flat keys "employee_name", "review_period", "reviewer", "overall_rating" and an array key "competencies" where each element has "name", "score", "comment".
